Lithospermum officinale is a perennial flowering plant in the borage family Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, particularly in supporting liver health and reducing inflammation.

The bioactive constituents of Lithospermum officinale include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids such as lithospermic acid and erythraline, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.

Lithospermum officinale is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties.
